## Infinite-Homography as Robust Conditioning for Camera-Controlled Video Generation

This skill implements techniques from the paper: Infinite-Homography as Robust Conditioning for Camera-Controlled Video Generation

### Core Concept

This paper presents a novel approach to solving important problems in machine learning and AI. The key innovation involves advanced methods that improve existing techniques.

### Implementation

For complete implementation details and code examples, refer to the official paper:
https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.17040

**When to use:**

- Production systems needing the specific capabilities described

**When NOT to use:**

- When simpler alternatives suffice
